creator: uzsolt@FreeBSD.org
text:
The maxima port now has a build error:

===> Checking for items in STAGEDIR missing from pkg-plist
Error: Orphaned: @dir man/man1

I found an error while configuring (maybe this is the reason of error above):

checking if makeinfo version >= 5.1... expr: syntax error
expr: syntax error
expr: syntax error
test: -lt: unexpected operator
 (6.8 or later preferred)
test: -ge: unexpected operator
test: -lt: unexpected operator

I think I found a bug, I'm working on it.
